Upcoming Events

Annual Charity Gala

September 15, 2023

Join us for our annual fundraising event to support local education initiatives.

Community Cleanup Drive

October 1, 2023

Help us keep Bonny Island beautiful by participating in our cleanup initiative.

Health and Wellness Fair

November 5, 2023

A day of free health screenings, wellness workshops, and fitness activities for the community.

Youth Leadership Seminar

December 10, 2023

Empowering the next generation of leaders through interactive workshops and mentoring sessions.
